conforto_carreira.name: Room Extension
conforto_carreira.desc: Compact kitchen, choice of two pieces of furniture. Window. Receive the benefits of resting once, without going overtime during a mission. +1 maximum stress.

conforto_carreira.name: Upgraded Meal Plan
conforto_carreira.desc: Switch to meal plan 'B'. +1 max PK.

conforto_carreira.name: Leave License
conforto_carreira.desc: You are entitled to one week of leave per year, with some travel allowances. You gain +1 maximum stress, +1 PK, and +1 sin limit.

conforto_carreira.name: Private Room
conforto_carreira.desc: Room available only for exorcists of category 3 or higher. +1 maximum stress.

conforto_carreira.name: Flexible Personal Hygiene Guidelines
conforto_carreira.desc: Permissions for different hairstyles exceeding CASTLE restrictions and small concessions for jewelry or makeup. CAT 3+ only.

conforto_carreira.name: Permitted Indulgences
conforto_carreira.desc: Small personal indulgences, permitted by CASTLE. Cigarettes, coffee, sweets, gum, spending money. Use to roll an extra rest die when resting.

conforto_carreira.name: Silver Pieces
conforto_carreira.desc: You are authorized to retire from exorcism. The work continues. You may work for CAIN in one of its many branches in an administrative capacity for the rest of your life, with potential opportunity for advancement.

oculto_medico.name: Qlippoth
oculto_medico.desc: Cursed fruit of Ymir's tree. Crush it to recover 1d3 psychic pulse.

oculto_medico.name: Ymir Tree Seed
oculto_medico.desc: During a rest, you can spend two rest dice to heal a wound, removing it.

oculto_medico.name: White Body
oculto_medico.desc: Seed of a condensed great sin. Can be broken to clear an affliction.

oculto_medico.name: Cursed Salt
oculto_medico.desc: When spread over a room-sized area, prevents humans from entering until pressure increases.

oculto_medico.name: Adrenal Pill
oculto_medico.desc: Consume to heal 2d3 stress, then reduce maximum stress by 1 for the rest of the mission. Can be used while pressure is rising.

oculto_medico.name: Black Blood Medicine
oculto_medico.desc: Consume on a dead exorcist who died in the same scene and has a (relatively) intact body to revive them. They will return with 2 wounds and mark 1 sin. All actions are considered difficult until resting.

oculto_medico.name: Black Body
oculto_medico.desc: Seed of a condensed great sin. Can be broken to reduce sin by 3d3, but permanently reduces the sin limit by 1.

oculto_medico.name: Ambrosia
oculto_medico.desc: Consume to gain 1 maximum and current psychic pulse. Effect does not stack and lasts until the end of the mission.

kits.name: Clerical Kit
kits.desc: Concentration. Official kit for exorcists performing administrative or research duties for CAIN's senior staff. Spend 1 PK to acquire one of the following items: printed copy of a SEER archive almanac (2 units), quality glasses, some quality pens, thick folders, notes on the area's history.

kits.name: Cleaning Kit
kits.desc: Visible. Official kit for exorcists performing cleaning tasks in their spare time, tasked with erasing traces of other hunts. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: Waterproof and stain-resistant overalls, safety goggles, gas mask, thick gloves, antitoxin (2 packs, 1 charge).

kits.name: Delinquent Kit
kits.desc: Unauthorized by the commissioner, mostly through the black market. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: penknife, lighter, boot knife, pack of assorted cigarettes, hair clips, hair pomade.

kits.name: Pilot Kit
kits.desc: Visible. Allocated with approval. You have quality driving gloves (1 pack) and access to a car on missions. The car has a talisman of 10 for damage and comfortably seats four people. If customized, you will be charged 2 scrips for a replacement.

kits.name: Field Kit
kits.desc: Visible. Official kit for exorcists performing field monitoring work. Spend 1 PK to acquire one of the following items: waterproof notebook, all-weather cape, quality boots, survival food, tent and sleeping bag (pack of 3), optical scope.

kits.name: Junk Kit
kits.desc: Visible. Look in parts. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: Rubber bands, writing case, good pen, chewable, screwdriver, duct tape, C-clamps, crowbar, battered toolbox.

kits.name: Monitor Kit
kits.desc: Official kit for exorcists working as monitors in their depots. Spend 1 PK to obtain one of the following items: two-way radio, powerful flashlight, stun baton, cap, flash-bang grenade (2 PK).

kits.name: Guard Kit
kits.desc: Visible. Official kit for junior exorcists working as gatekeepers in TEMERITY's extremely sensitive facilities, built to contain forces beyond human understanding. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: Sacred text (2 PK), rosary, standard large daggers, suicide pill, perfumed oils, ancient censer.

kits.name: Morgue Kit
kits.desc: Concentration. Official kit for exorcists performing forensic work on classified bodies of ordinary humans brought to CAIN facilities. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: tweezers, compact magnifying glass, scalpel, sample collector, compact respirator mask, wet wipes.

kits.name: Carrier Kit
kits.desc: Visible. Official kit for exorcists working as carriers in their vast internal facilities. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: Durable backpack, folding ladder, pitons, ice pick, 9 meters of quality safety rope, flashlight.

kits.name: Study Kit
kits.desc: Official kit for students of all ages continuing their studies in the school facilities while working. Spend 1 PK to choose one of the following items: electronic dictionary, translation guide, local map, pencil case, notebook, or textbook on a relevant subject (2 PK).

esteticos.name: Service Uniform
esteticos.desc: Free standard service uniform, including sash, shoes, and cloak clasp. Not tailored. Shoes are recycled. Aesthetics bring no mechanical benefits. All have 0 PK. CAIN's dress code is strictly regulated (see CASTLE doctrine c9800).

esteticos.name: Ceremonial Uniform
esteticos.desc: Cassock or cloak. Tailored. Made from high-quality, comfortable fabric. Includes optional head or face covering for greater discretion.

esteticos.name: Comfortable Shoes
esteticos.desc: Custom-made shoes. Production subject to availability.

esteticos.name: Suit
esteticos.desc: High-quality tailored suit, available only for CAT 2+ exorcists.

esteticos.name: Casual Clothes
esteticos.desc: Authorized casual attire that allows bypassing CAIN's dress restrictions when off-duty. Strictly prohibited for use on missions. Available only for CAT 3+ exorcists.

esteticos.name: Formal Clothes
esteticos.desc: Authorized formal attire for organizational events. Impeccable cut. Not approved for field use. Includes permission to wear jewelry. Available only for CAT 2+ exorcists.

esteticos.name: Overcoat
esteticos.desc: Overcoat covering all uniforms. Rain-resistant, tailored, and of very high quality. Some customization options. Available only for CAT 4+ exorcists.

esteticos.name: Gala Uniform
esteticos.desc: Formal uniform including a half-cloak, originally for use at ceremonial events. Available only for CAT 3+ exorcists.

posses.name: Mobile Phone
posses.desc: Personal mobile phone. Pay 3 scrip to get one with more options and internet access.

posses.name: Credit Card
posses.desc: Card that works with most currencies with a pre-loaded balance for everyday purchases. Never enough to buy anything expensive.

posses.name: Clerical Kit
posses.desc: Concentration. Official kit for exorcists performing administrative or research duties for CAIN's senior staff. Spend 1 PK to acquire one of the following items: printed copy of a SEER archive almanac (2 units), quality glasses, some quality pens, thick folders, notes on the area's history.

posses.name: Cleaning Kit
posses.desc: Visible. Official kit for exorcists performing cleaning tasks in their spare time, tasked with erasing traces of other hunts. Hateful work. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: Waterproof and stain-resistant overalls, safety goggles, gas mask, thick gloves, antitoxin (2 packs, 1 charge).

posses.name: Delinquent Kit
posses.desc: Unauthorized by the commissioner, mostly through the black market. Spend 1 PK to take one of the following items: penknife, lighter, boot knife, pack of assorted cigarettes, hair clips, hair pomade.

posses.name: Pilot Kit
posses.desc: Visible. Allocated with approval. You have quality driving gloves (1 pack) and access to a car on missions. The car has a talisman of 10 for damage and comfortably seats four people. If customized, you will be charged 2 scrips for a replacement.
